data.name: rusty iron sword
data.long_desc: This iron sword has seen better days. Rust covers most of the blade, but it still looks sharp enough to do some damage.
data.room_desc: A rusty iron sword lies here.

data.name: steel longsword
data.long_desc: A well-crafted longsword made of polished steel. The blade is perfectly balanced and razor-sharp.
data.room_desc: A gleaming steel longsword rests against the wall.

data.name: iron dagger
data.long_desc: A simple iron dagger with a leather-wrapped handle. Small but deadly in the right hands.
data.room_desc: An iron dagger lies on the ground.

data.name: wooden club
data.long_desc: A crude but effective weapon - just a thick piece of hardwood shaped into a club.

data.name: battle axe
data.long_desc: A large two-handed axe with a crescent-shaped blade. It requires both hands to wield effectively.
data.room_desc: A fearsome battle axe leans against the wall.

data.name: old key
data.long_desc: A tarnished brass key with an ornate handle. It must open something important.
data.room_desc: An old brass key lies here.

data.name: stone statue
data.long_desc: A life-sized statue of a warrior carved from granite. It is far too heavy to move.
data.room_desc: A large stone statue stands here, watching silently.

data.name: healing potion
data.long_desc: A small glass vial filled with a glowing red liquid. Drinking it will restore health.
data.room_desc: A red healing potion sits here.

consumable_data.use_message_room: {player} quaff a {item} and begin to feel better.
consumable_data.use_message_self: You quaff a {item} and begin to feel better.

data.name: torch
data.long_desc: A wooden torch wrapped in oil-soaked rags. It can be lit to provide illumination.

data.name: lantern
data.long_desc: A sturdy iron lantern with a glass enclosure. It provides steady light and can be refueled.

data.name: sparkling ruby
data.long_desc: A beautiful ruby that catches the light. It must be worth a fortune.  Give it to Dave!

data.name: leather scraps
data.long_desc: Pieces of leather suitable for crafting.

data.name: crusty key
data.long_desc: This rusty dilapidated key looks like it's about to fall apart.

data.name: basic lockpick set
data.long_desc: A relatively cheap lockpick set made for beginners.

data.name: quarterstaff
data.long_desc: This is a six-foot wooden staff, bound about the middle with stripes of cloth. It is a simple weapon, and does not deal very much damage, but provides good defense as it is quite quick to use.

data.name: padded vest
data.long_desc: This is a heavy vest made out of crudely-quilted cloth. It is one-size-fits-all, with a rope belt to cinch the waste.  It provides decent protection,. but is very heavy for its combat worth.

data.name: padded pants
data.long_desc: This is a simple pair of heavy cloth pants.  They are of questionable quality, and are tailored to fit nearly anyone.  A rope is tied about the waist to keep them up.

data.name: padded helm
data.long_desc: This is an open-face helmet made out of heavy quilted cloth.  Its multiple layers of crude cloth make it fairly heavy for its meager protection, but it is better than entering combat without one.  A bare head makes an inviting target to opponents.

data.name: padded gloves
data.long_desc: These heavy gloves are made of a canvas-like cloth, crudely stitched.  They are a common sight on any working man's hands as they protect well from chafing, and provide some protection from damage.

data.name: padded boots
data.long_desc: These knee-length boots are made of heavy quilted cloth with coiled rope soles.  They provide little protection and are fairly heavy, but they are better than nothing.

data.name: small bag of holding
data.long_desc: A small modest leather satchel rests lightly in your hands, its surface worn smooth by time yet strangely untouched by age. The mouth of the bag yawns wider than it should, its interior fading into a depth that defies sight. Despite whatever it may contain, it feels nearly weightless, as if its burden is carried somewhere far beyond this world.

data.name: gold coins
data.long_desc: The gold crowns are rustic and used.

data.name: copper coins
data.long_desc: The copper farthings look like they've been around forever.

data.name: silver coins
data.long_desc: The silver nobles glitter with use.

data.name: platinum coins
data.long_desc: The platinum pieces shine as though they were new.

data.name: runic coins
data.long_desc: The runic coins glitter like nothing you have ever seen before.

data.name: loaf of bread
data.long_desc: A freshly baked loaf of bread with a golden crust and a soft, warm interior. It gives off a comforting aroma that hints at simple, hearty nourishment.

data.name: loaf of rye bread
data.long_desc: A dense loaf of rye bread with a dark crust and a rich, earthy scent. Its firm texture and slightly sour aroma suggest a more filling and robust meal.

data.name: scroll of magic missile
data.long_desc: A tightly wound scroll crackles faintly with restrained energy, its surface etched with precise arcane sigils that seem to shift when studied too long. A subtle hum pulses from within, as if the spell is already formed and waiting to be unleashed. Even at rest, the air around it feels charged, promising a swift and unerring strike when invoked.

consumable_data.use_message_room: {player} chants the writing on {item} while pointing at {target}!
consumable_data.use_message_self: You chant the writing on {item} while pointing at {target}!
consumable_data.use_message_target: {player} chants the writing on {item} while pointing at you!

data.name: tome of magic missle
data.long_desc: A worn leather-bound tome rests heavily in your hands, its pages filled with careful arcane diagrams and precise notations detailing the shaping of raw energy into focused force. The script is dense but deliberate, guiding the reader through the discipline required to summon and direct the spell. Unlike a charged scroll, the magic here is quiet and patient, waiting to be understood rather than unleashed.

consumable_data.use_message_room: {player} consume the knowledge in {item} with excitement!
consumable_data.use_message_self: You consume the knowledge in {item} with excitement!

data.name: a signpost
data.long_desc: Welcome to Hearthstead!  Please roam around and meet our vendors and say Hello to them by typing ">[name] Hi" or ">[name] Hello!".    Most people are friendly in our small hamlet, but if you stray out in the wilderness.  You may come across some less friendly animals and people.   If you need any help, just type the words "help".

data.name: tome of blur
data.long_desc: A slender tome bound in faded blue leather rests lightly in your hands, its pages filled with shifting diagrams that seem slightly out of focus. The script wavers as you read, describing the art of bending light and perception around the body. The magic within feels subtle and elusive, teaching not force, but misdirection.

consumable_data.use_message_room: {player} focus on the contents of the {item} as their eyes show understanding.
consumable_data.use_message_self: You focus on the contents of the {item} as your eyes show understanding.

data.name: tome of harm
data.long_desc: A dark, weighty tome rests in your hands, its pages etched with solemn prayers and unsettling rites that speak of suffering drawn from within. The script is precise and unyielding, detailing how divine power can be turned inward against a foe’s very essence. A faint unease lingers as you read, as if the knowledge itself carries a quiet cost.

data.name: tome of minor healing
data.long_desc: A tome that has the training to learn the spell minor healing

consumable_data.use_message_room: {player}'s eyes absorb the text and you can feel a gentle warmth take hold as you learn the art of minor healing.
consumable_data.use_message_self: Your eyes absorb the text and you can feel a gentle warmth take hold as you learn the art of minor healing.

data.name: tome of illuminate
data.long_desc: A slim tome bound in pale leather rests in your hands, its pages etched with delicate symbols that seem to glow faintly even in dim light. The script describes the shaping of pure radiance, guiding the reader in drawing light from the unseen. As you study it, a soft brightness seems to gather at the edge of your vision, as if the spell is already beginning to awaken.

consumable_data.use_message_room: As {player} absorbs the spell, you notice feel a gentle spark of light awaken within {player}.
consumable_data.use_message_self: As you absorb the spell, you feel a gentle spark of light awaken within you.

data.name: leather pants
data.long_desc: A pair of sturdy leather pants crafted from supple, well-tanned hide, offering both flexibility and protection. The material is worn smooth in places, yet remains durable enough to withstand rough travel and combat. Reinforced stitching along the seams ensures they hold up under strain.

data.name: soft leather cap
data.long_desc: A soft leather cap rests lightly on the head, shaped from supple hide that conforms comfortably to its wearer. Though modest in appearance, it offers a measure of protection without hindering movement or vision. The leather is well-worked and smooth, showing careful craftsmanship.

data.name: leather gloves
data.long_desc: A pair of well-crafted leather gloves fits snugly, the supple hide allowing for both protection and dexterity. The material is soft yet durable, offering a firm grip without restricting movement. Fine stitching along the seams speaks to their careful make.

data.name: leather skirt
data.long_desc: A leather skirt crafted from supple, well-tanned hide falls in layered panels for ease of movement. The material is both flexible and durable, offering modest protection without restricting mobility. Reinforced seams and careful stitching reflect practical, skilled workmanship.

data.name: gianthair vest
data.long_desc: A vest of coarse gianthair drapes heavily across the torso, its thick, bristled fibers offering rugged protection. The material feels rough to the touch but is tightly woven for durability. Though uncomfortable, it provides reliable defense against wear and blows.

data.name: rigid leather tunic
data.long_desc: A rigid leather tunic is formed from thick, hardened hide, shaped to protect the torso with firm, unyielding plates. The material sacrifices flexibility for durability, offering solid defense against strikes. Broad seams and reinforced edges show it was built for function over comfort.

data.name: rigid leather pants
data.long_desc: A pair of rigid leather pants is fashioned from thick, hardened hide, offering firm protection to the legs. The stiff material restricts movement somewhat but provides solid defense against blows. Reinforced seams and layered panels emphasize durability over comfort.

data.name: hardened leather gauntlets
data.long_desc: A pair of hardened leather gauntlets encases the hands in thick, rigid hide, built to absorb impact and protect the knuckles. The stiff construction limits fine movement but provides strong defense in close combat. Reinforced plates and heavy stitching give them a rugged, battle-ready feel.

data.name: hardened leather boots
data.long_desc: A pair of hardened leather boots is crafted from thick, rigid hide, built to protect the feet from rough terrain and heavy impact. The sturdy soles and reinforced toes provide solid defense, though the stiffness makes them less comfortable for long wear. Heavy stitching and layered construction speak to their durability.

data.name: bulletin board
data.long_desc:
Heartstead Village Bulitin Board
- Available Rooms:  {red}SOLD OUT{/}, only camping available at this time.
- Food and Beverage: See {magenta}Helga{/}
- Training Services: See {magenta}Toren{/} in the Inn's back room.
- To Any Able Soul: Opportunities await those willing.  See {magenta}Garak{/} in the back hall and ask {green}"Opportunities"{/}.

data.name: torn journal
data.long_desc: A battered leather journal, its pages water-stained and torn. The last entry is scrawled in a shaking hand, describing green-skinned creatures with yellow eyes lurking in a cave to the north.
